◎译　　名　在我的房间
◎片　　名　In My Room
◎年　　代　2020
◎产　　地　法国 / 意大利
◎类　　别　剧情 / 短片
◎语　　言　法语
◎上映日期　2020-09-06(威尼斯电影节)
◎IMDb评分  6.1/10 from 605 users
◎IMDb链接  https://www.imdb.com/title/tt12762684/
◎豆瓣评分　7.1/10 from 190 users
◎豆瓣链接　https://movie.douban.com/subject/35154340/
◎片　　长　20分钟
◎导　　演　玛缇·迪欧普 Mati Diop
◎编　　剧　玛缇·迪欧普 Mati Diop

◎简　　介  

　　Made during confinement, “In My Room” plunges us into the poignant story of a woman at the twilight of her life, through recordings of the director’s deceased grandmother. Living rooms become stages where life is performed. Windows become portals to the lives of others.
